changeSet.author: kavach
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE vault_user ( id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, username TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, master_password_hash TEXT NOT NULL, pbkdf2_salt BLOB NOT NULL, email TEXT NOT NULL, created_at TEXT NOT NULL )

changeSet.author: kavach
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE credential ( id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, user_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES vault_user(id), purpose TEXT NOT NULL, username TEXT NOT NULL, encrypted_password BLOB NOT NULL, dek_encrypted BLOB NOT NULL, iv BLOB NOT NULL, created_at TEXT NOT NULL, updated_at TEXT NOT NULL )
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS uq_credential_user_purpose ON credential (user_id, purpose)

changeSet.author: kavach
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE audit_log ( id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, user_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES vault_user(id), credential_id INTEGER REFERENCES credential(id), action TEXT NOT NULL, timestamp TEXT NOT NULL, ip_address TEXT )

changeSet.author: kavach
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE app_config ( config_key TEXT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL, value_encrypted BLOB NOT NULL, updated_at TEXT NOT NULL )
